jobs.prompt: 16:9 abstract editorial illustration for a university lecture on complex numbers and the Argand plane. Visual metaphor: two perpendicular soft axes suggesting the real–imaginary plane, a gentle focal glow at the crossing, faint curved arcs suggesting rotation or phase. Warm paper background #faf9f5, ink-like shapes #141413, dusty blue accent #6a9bcc and terracotta #d97757, olive #788c5d. Premium academic magazine style, generous negative space. Absolutely no readable text, letters, digits, formulas, chart tick labels, or UI.
